nasb.text: So also the tongue is a small part of the body, and yet it boasts of great things. See how great a forest is set aflame by such a small fire!

esv.text: So also the tongue is a small member, yet it boasts of great things. How great a forest is set ablaze by such a small fire!

cnv.text: 照樣，舌頭雖然是個小肢體，卻會說誇大的話。 試看，星星之火，可以燎原；

ccb.text: 同样，人的舌头虽然很小，却能说夸大的话。 看啊，小火星能点燃大森林。

csbs.text: 照样，舌头虽然是身体上一个小小的部分，却能大大地自夸。看哪，那么小的火，能点燃那么大的森林！
